title: Pumping Concrete
body: Concrete is pumped from a cement mixer to the place it is being laid, instead of being carried in wheelbarrows. The flow rate is $$200$$ $$\frac{L}{min}$$ through a $$50.0-m-long$$, $$8.00-cm-diameter$$ hose, and the pressure at the pump is $$8\times{10}^6$$ $$\frac{N}{m^2}$$. Assume laminar flow.
